title: Contradictory Order Set Aside: Tribunal Confirms Benami Attachments in ARC Group Cas
description:
The issue was cancellation of GST registration without recording reasons or granting a hearing. The Court held such orders violate due process and remanded the matter for fresh adjudication.
The post Contradictory Order Set Aside: Tribunal Confirms Benami Attachments in ARC Group Cas appeared first on TaxGuru.
